text.title: Agent Postmortem Template (Agent-as-Defendant) Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example applying agent-postmortem-template to a representative case. Walks step-by-step through the procedure, shows the produced artefact, and highlights the rules it satisfies.

section.title: Setup
section.p: Context: a team that matches the Applies-If conditions for agent-postmortem-template. Inputs are populated per the Prerequisites table.

list.item: Step 1: Pull the trace and model pin. — produced trace pulled.
Step 2: Diff system prompt vs last green eval. — produced prompt diff.
Step 3: Attribute root cause to one of six layers. — produced attribution.
Step 4: Define regression case; run baseline eval. — produced eval before.
Step 5: Ship fix; re-run eval; verify green. — produced eval after.
Step 6: Attach replay artefacts; file trace gaps as action items. — produced postmortem.md.

section.title: Final artefact
section.p: The team commits the final artefact (per report shape) at the version-controlled path declared in the output contract. Owner signs and links it to downstream consumers.

list.item: r1: Every postmortem records the exact model identifier (provider plus version pin, e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5-2025092
r2: Every postmortem includes a byte-exact prompt diff: system prompt at the time of incident vs system prompt at the last g
r3: Layer Attribution assigns root cause to exactly one of six layers (model, system prompt, tool schema, tool result, retri
r4: Eval delta is recorded: score on the regression case before the fix, target score after. Closure requires the after-fix
r5: Replay artefacts (rendered prompt, tool-call payloads, tool results, retrieved chunks, response) are attached as files o
